div1.entryFree: Slight, vb. to treat as insignificant, to put off with contempt: puts him off, --s him, Wint. IV, 4, 200. your most dreadful laws so loosely --ed, H4B V, 2, 94. my letters were --ed off, Caes. IV, 3, 5. the rogues --ed me into the river with as little remorse as they would have drowned a blind bitch's puppies, Wiv. III, 5, 9 (== threw me heedlessly).
